title: RM13 8QS, Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/GB3739DY/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited Installation name: Riverside Sludge Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/GB3739DY/V004  "
